OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Tony Schoenberg; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not Reported. (Dept. 218)

Appearances:
Doug Zaribnisky, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Fillmore Center Associates, L.P.
Attorney, Alan Horwitz representing the plaintiff.

Defendants, Mike Nettles aka M. Nettles, and Heath Peterson are present.
Attorney, Jonathan D. Stewart representing the defendants through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 1535 Eddy Street, Apt. #504, San Francisco, California.

This case did settle. The trial date of AUG-03-2009 is vacated.
